name: aldanat-quality-intelligence
description: Aldanat Quality Intelligence (AQI) — staff quality performance platform for Aldanat Care (residential, supported living and outreach services for adults with learning disabilities).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
